sellers_note: This 2016 Honda Civic LX delivers dependable performance and practical features for everyday driving. With its white exterior and clean Carfax history, this sedan presents an excellent opportunity to own a well-maintained vehicle from a manufacturer known for reliability. - Clean Carfax - 2.0L I4 DOHC 16V i-VTEC engine - CVT transmission with front-wheel drive - 31 city / 41 highway MPG - Automatic temperature control with air conditioning - Rear window defroster - Power windows and power door mirrors - Remote keyless entry - Steering wheel mounted audio controls - Cruise control - Electronic stability control and traction control - Four-wheel independent suspension with front and rear anti-roll bars - Exterior parking camera with rear view - Reclining front bucket seats with center armrest The Civic LX combines efficiency with comfort. The 2.0-liter engine paired with the CVT transmission provides responsive acceleration while delivering impressive fuel economy. With 31 MPG in city driving and 41 MPG on the highway, this vehicle minimizes trips to the gas station without sacrificing performance. The automatic temperature control keeps the cabin comfortable in any season, and the rear window defroster ensures clear visibility during winter months. Safety and convenience are prioritized throughout this sedan. The vehicle includes dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, and an overhead airbag system to protect occupants. Electronic stability control and traction control work together to maintain grip in challenging driving conditions. The four-wheel independent suspension absorbs road imperfections, while speed-sensing steering adapts to highway and city driving. The exterior parking camera provides added confidence when reversing into tight spaces. Everyday usability features enhance the ownership experience. Steering wheel mounted controls let you adjust audio and cruise control without taking your hands off the wheel. Fully automatic headlights activate when needed, and the compass display helps with navigation. The illuminated entry system welcomes you when you approach, while remote keyless entry provides secure access. The 160-watt AM/FM audio system delivers clear sound through four speakers, keeping you entertained during your commute. The interior presents a practical, clean design suited for daily use. Front bucket seats with reclining capability offer flexibility for long drives or parking, while the front center armrest provides additional comfort. Cloth seat trim is easy to maintain, and the tilt telescoping steering wheel accommodates drivers of different heights and preferences. This Civic LX represents solid value in the used sedan market. The vehicle's reputation for longevity, combined with its fuel efficiency and well-rounded feature set, makes it a sensible choice for buyers seeking dependable transportation.
